violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

The hand-washing sink in the toilet room is lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding employees to wash their hands must be posted at all hand-washing sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils (coffee pot and urns) after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. PIC stated coffee bar area is for employee use only. All coffee bar equipment and supplies must be relocated to an area inaccessible to customers, and all food contact surfaces must be washed, rinsed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

The door frame to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting, with light visible along the side of it. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2025
Mop water is disposed of in the 3 bay sink, with the mop sink used for storage. Mop water must be disposed of in the mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The dumpster outside is located partially on the ground. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The outside area along the back of the building has an accumulation of trash, litter, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Ceiling tiles in the back storage area are in poor repair, some broken and stained from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The floors beneath market shelves have an accumulation of soil residue, cobwebs, and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The 3 bay sink has an accumulation of soil residue and debris, with the mop in one bay, and a bucket, and beverages stored in the other 2. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
